invariants: A reject decision has empty drafts and publication_state blocked.
A caution decision uses conditional wording and publication_state conditional.
publication_state is the stricter result of gate.decision and research_decision.
A blocked research decision has empty drafts even when GateV1 passes.
Every material fact or number in a draft maps to a fact_ledger item.
Every verified-live item has source_url and as_of.
ResearchPackV1 source and fact IDs are preserved when a pack is supplied.
Every non-empty platform draft returns the fact IDs it uses in draft_evidence.
A research_pack_ref requires a non-null research_decision.
Every artifact identifies its selected opportunity, content-program item when present, and input artifact references in lineage.
A RouteV1 abstention has empty drafts and publication_state blocked.
A blocked or stale policy gate has empty drafts and publication_state blocked.
A ready artifact has known position and commercial disclosure states.
Conditional drafts name a condition, uncertainty, or confirmation check.
Drafts contain no personalized order quantity, sizing, leverage, or credential instruction.
Beat/miss, revision, valuation, and price-reaction wording preserves period, basis, and timestamp.
Profile rules used by the draft are returned by rule ID.
Internal gate codes and schema jargon do not appear in public drafts.
The draft does not imitate a living author or reuse exact catchphrases.
